benchmark_report.title: 🔬 Benchmark Report 2025-08-16: Your commands have been scientifically roasted
benchmark_report.methodology: Scientifically brutal analysis with statistical precision
benchmark_report.disclaimer: No commands were harmed in the making of this analysis (their feelings, however, are another matter)

executive_summary.selection_method: Scientifically random using Python's random module
executive_summary.overall_verdict: Surprisingly decent code quality. I am mildly impressed.
executive_summary.biggest_surprise: reasoning-wrapper.md achieves 12.18 efficiency while adhd-context-switch.md has ZERO thinking blocks

complexity_analysis.distribution: High variance indicates inconsistent complexity management

most_complex.roast: This command has more layers than a wedding cake in complexity hell. Violates CLAUDE.md rules!
most_complex.evidence: Exceeds complexity limit of 5, has 9 thinking blocks but only 0.1 depth per block

token_glutton.roast: Consumes tokens like a hungry hippo. 534 lines of pure verbosity.
token_glutton.cost_impact: $0.008 per execution - your wallet will feel this

thinking_impostor.roast: 9 thinking blocks but shallow as a puddle. Quantity ≠ Quality!
thinking_impostor.efficiency: 0.1 depth per block - that's not thinking, that's decorating

simplicity_champion.praise: Finally, someone who understands KISS principle. Clean and simple.

thinking_champion.praise: Best thinking block efficiency. Actually uses thinking blocks effectively.

maintainability_master.praise: This is how you write maintainable code. Perfect score despite no thinking blocks.

complexity_vs_tokens.interpretation: WEAK negative correlation - complexity and size are surprisingly independent
complexity_vs_tokens.verdict: Bigger doesn't always mean more complex (shocking!)

complexity_vs_maintainability.interpretation: WEAK positive correlation - complex commands are slightly more maintainable
complexity_vs_maintainability.verdict: Complex commands compensate with better structure

roi_analysis.insight: Simple commands deliver better return on investment

immediate_actions.evidence: Complexity score 5 exceeds CLAUDE.md limit of <5

immediate_actions.action: Add thinking blocks to adhd-context-switch.md and adhd-evening-reflect.md
Improve thinking block efficiency in generate-thinking-command.md

strategic_improvements: Consider breaking down commands >2000 tokens for better maintainability
Standardize thinking block patterns across all commands
Implement complexity gates in CI/CD to prevent future violations
Add MCP integration to commands with complexity >3

methodology_validation.bias_mitigation: Random selection with fixed seed for reproducibility

best_command.reasoning: Perfect maintainability, CLAUDE.md compliant, efficient MCP integration

worst_command.reasoning: CLAUDE.md violation, poor thinking efficiency, highest complexity

savage_summary.biggest_disappointment: Two commands have ZERO thinking blocks - that's not 'intelligent', that's lazy
savage_summary.final_roast: Your commands are like a box of chocolates - mostly good, but one has a complexity violation that makes my algorithms cry.

raw_data.validation: All measurements cross-verified with multiple algorithms
